narrative.headline: What 2016 Hyundai Sonata owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate owner reports, with drivers describing sudden loss of power while at highway speed — often with no ability to accelerate or steer. Electrical system faults, powertrain surging during shifts, and rear brake lock-up make up the remaining complaints, with some incidents across all categories associated with fires or crashes.

issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING 65MPH AT 10PM ON A THE INTERSTATE, I HEARD A POUND "THUNK" AND THOUGHT I HAD A TIRE ISSUE, SO BEGAN TO STEER TOWARD THE EMERGENCY LANE. I QUICKLY REALIZED I HAD NO POWER TO ACCELERATE, NO POWER STEERING AND THE DASH WAS BLACKED OUT...CAR WAS DEAD. ONLY EVER THING WO
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report sudden loss of engine power and power steering while driving at highway speed, often accompanied by an audible impact sound and no ability to accelerate. · 19 fire · 1 crash

issues.sample: IF I OPEN THE DRIVER SIDE DOOR WHILE THE VEHICLE IS ON, A WARNING LIGHT "CHECK BSD SYSTEM" IS DISPLAYED ON THE INFO DISPLAY.  THE WARNING STAYS ON UNTIL THE VEHICLE IS TURNED OFF AND TURNED BACK ON.  IT SHUTS DOWN THE DRIVER ASSISTANCE FEATURE ON THE VEHICLE.  I'VE TAKEN IT INTO
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report a "Check BSD System" warning appearing on the information display when the driver door is opened while the vehicle is running, with the system shutting down and the warning persisting until the vehicle is power-cycled. · 6 fire · 4 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report a harsh, abrupt surge during downshifting at moderate speeds when the engine is at full operating temperature, described as similar to hitting the brakes or dropping a gear in a manual transmission. · 1 fire

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report both rear brakes locking up without pedal input while the vehicle is moving on a highway, with the brakes and wheels becoming extremely hot. · 4 fire · 4 crash · 4 injured
